name: MailruMail
description: Read, search and send Mail.ru email over IMAP/SMTP.

name: FastmailMail
description: Read, search and send Fastmail email over IMAP/SMTP.

name: Dropbox
description: Browse, search, upload and share Dropbox files via the remote MCP server (OAuth 2.1).

name: Notion
description: Pages and databases via Notion's MCP server.

name: Slack
description: Post and read channel messages via Slack's MCP server.

name: Linear
description: Issues, projects, triage via Linear's remote MCP server (OAuth 2.1).

name: Sentry
description: Errors and issue details via Sentry's remote MCP server (OAuth 2.1).
